description: Color event photograph (no on-image text or graphic overlay) of a naturalization ceremony held at Dodger Stadium. A woman in a dark suit (USCIS Director Ur M. Jaddou) stands at a clear lectern with her right hand raised, administering the oath of allegiance. The lectern front bears the round seal of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security. American flags and a DHS/USCIS-colored flag flank the stage; tiered stadium seating filled with attendees forms the background, with 'DODGER STAD...' and 'SINCE...' signage visible. In the soft-focus foreground a person in military camouflage uniform raises a hand taking the oath, and a seated photographer or AV operator in sunglasses is in the mid-ground. It accompanies a tweet stating that 2,100 people from 120 countries became new U.S. citizens. No slogan or designed typography appears on the image. From Aug 2022.
notable_text: (none on image; incidental venue signage 'DODGER STADIUM' visible. Tweet celebrates 2,100 new citizens from 120 countries)
